lines.text: Kept up all night by now your shoulder needs a shoulder to cry
Watching a quiet movie fading from my tired eyes
Afraid of being right afraid of being afraid
Keeping my chin up so those tears can fall behind out of sight
Again again tell me I gotta Dream on Dream on
End of line what have I to Dream On Dream On?
Kill the lights say we’re fine in a world on fire
All i do all I can do is
Dream On Dream On Dream On
This is the time when i
Cuz when I find the words you skip all the lines I, Im frozen
